items.title: PCs & Smartphones Supply Constrained
items.summary: Global unit shipments of PCs and smartphones were both down versus a year ago in the 2nd quarter of 2026, according to IDC. PCs were down 4.9% and smartphones were down 6.7%. Both PCs and smartphones showed growth in 2024 and 2025. IDC is...

items.title: NEVI gets real in Illinois as first federally funded EV chargers go online
items.summary: The Illinois Department of Transportation (IDOT) cut the ribbon on the state's first federally-funded EV charging station this week, after energizing new high-speed chargers at a Phillips 66 Mach 1 station in Casey, IL.
